case_title: ISABELLA HENDRY ET AL VS. SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: EXHIBIT (PLAINTIFF - HENDRY ET AL) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: AUG-30-2023 AT 3:30PM}

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-28-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ISABELLA HENDRY AND TIMOTHY BURKE ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANNY SCHER (OWNER) WITH WITNESS SHERI CASTILYN. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT IN THE COURTROOM IN THE AMOUNT OF $825.00 TOTAL BY WAY OF A PAYMENT BY CHECK DEFENDANT IS TO MAIL TO THE PLAINTIFFS. A PROGRESS REPORT HEARING IS SET FOR 12/28/23 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES MUST APPEAR ONLY IF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT HAVE NOT BEEN FULFILLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES ON 12/28/23, THE COURT WILL DISMISS PLAINTIFFS' CASE WITH PREJUDICE PER THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
